research_decision: PATTERN A (Documentation-Driven Runtime) locked by Gemini at 23:50-00:00 UTC June 11-12
architecture_summary: 3-layer: PLAYBOOKS+CONNECTORS+SKILLS, MCP+Custom Connector pairs, YAML frontmatter SKILL.md (Anthropic Agent Skills Spec), file system as extended brain

U2.1.A.description: Built 3 new gatekeeper tools: view_file, execute_skill, list_playbooks

tools_added.name: view_file
tools_added.description: Read any file from the knowledge base or codebase. Supports local repo files (organizations/, skills/, lib/) and VPS cortex files (jarvis/cortex/, jarvis/prd/) via bridge.

input_schema.maxLength: number - Max characters to return (default 20000, max 50000)

tools_added.name: execute_skill
tools_added.description: Execute a named skill from the knowledge base. Loads SKILL.md, parses YAML frontmatter per Anthropic Agent Skills Spec, returns execution contract with steps and tool references.

input_schema.skill_name: string - Name of the skill to execute
input_schema.params: object - Optional parameters for skill execution

features: YAML frontmatter parsing (Anthropic Agent Skills Spec)
Multi-source resolution (local repo, VPS bridge, jarvis/cortex)

tools_added.name: list_playbooks
tools_added.description: List all available organizational playbooks. Scans organizations/ directory and VPS cortex. Returns playbook paths, domains, titles, routine counts, and safeguard counts.

input_schema.search: string - Search playbook titles and routines

tools_preserved.name: load_skill
tools_preserved.description: On-demand skill loading with multi-path resolution

tools_preserved.name: self_code
tools_preserved.description: Small self-code fixes via Vercel Sandbox SDK

tools_preserved.name: spawn_v2
tools_preserved.description: V2 handoff for complex coding tasks

U2.1.B.description: Wrote NEPTUNE.md at repo root as 38-line traffic controller, injected into system prompt

system_prompt_injection.position: Header of system prompt, before regularPrompt

U2.1.C.description: Reduced tools array from 21 to 6, moved legacy connectors to _legacy/

legacy_connectors.status: All 13 connectors preserved in codebase, not exposed as individual tools

U2.1.D.description: Final synthesis — curl verification of all phases

tools_endpoint.raw_response: {"tools":[{"name":"view_file","category":"gatekeeper","description":"Read any file from the knowledge base or codebase. Use for playbooks, skills, PRDs, configuration, or source code. Paths: organizations/<org>/<domain>/playbook-*.md, jarvis/cortex/skills/<name>.md, lib/, app/."},{"name":"execute_skill","category":"gatekeeper","description":"Execute a named skill from the knowledge base. Loads SKILL.md, parses YAML frontmatter (Anthropic Agent Skills Spec), and returns the full execution contract with steps and tool references. Use for domain-specific operations that have documented procedures."},{"name":"list_playbooks","category":"gatekeeper","description":"List all available organizational playbooks from organizations/. Returns each playbook's path, domain, title, routine count, and safeguard count. Use to discover what operational procedures are documented before loading a specific playbook."},{"name":"load_skill","category":"gatekeeper","description":"Load detailed skill content on-demand. Categories: connectors/ (NMI, Slack, GitHub, Vercel), capabilities/ (self-coding, sandbox), organizations/<org>/<domain>/ (org-specific playbooks). Keeps context efficient — only load what you need, when you need it."},{"name":"self_code","category":"gatekeeper","description":"Make SMALL changes to Neptune Chat's own codebase (typos, color tweaks, copy changes, prop additions). Uses Vercel Sandbox SDK to clone, edit, build, push, and deploy. For anything bigger than 50 lines or 3 files, use spawn_v2 instead."},{"name":"spawn_v2","category":"gatekeeper","description":"Hand off complex multi-step coding tasks to Neptune V2. Modes: 'modify_existing' (clone repo, fix, commit, PR, deploy) and 'new_project' (create GitHub repo, scaffold Next.js 16 + shadcn, push, deploy to Vercel). Use for any task too large for self_code."}],"count":6,"architecture":"U2-Progressive-Disclosure","pattern":"Documentation-Driven Runtime (Pattern A)","version":"2.1.0"}

chat_endpoint.smoke_test: PASSED — route responds correctly (auth required, no 500/404)

cardinals_preserved.no_vps_python_edits: COMPLIANT — No Python files modified, no pm2 reloads

next_phase: U2.2 — Playbook-Aware Routing (load_skill → domain-specific routing intelligence)
